_readme: pipeline v7 — whisper 실측+간격배분+감쇠보정, QA 통과분
title: Do you mind? / Not at all
expression: Do you mind? / Not at all

sentences.en: ★ Excuse me. Do you mind? Everywhere else is full.
sentences.ko: ★ 저기, 실례해도 될까? 다른 덴 다 찼어서.

sentences.en: ★ I'm Ron, by the way. Ron Weasley.
sentences.ko: ★ 아 참, 난 론이야. 론 위즐리.
